title: elaphrium simaruba
intro: Elaphrium simaruba, also known as the West Indian birch or birch of the West Indies, is a medicinal plant native to the Caribbean and Central America. Its bark contains a rich source of lignans, which possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Elaphrium simaruba include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Elaphrium simaruba include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or orally to harness its medicinal properties.
